name: Cuatro Cuba Libre
description: A refreshing Cuba Libre variation made with BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, cola, and fresh lime. BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and cola transforms this classic cuba libre cocktail into a complex, but still refreshing libation with a bright and zesty finish from the squeezed fresh lime. A perfect drink to enjoy with friends.
recipe_steps: Build: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Squeeze 2 lime wedges over the ice and drop them into the glass.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir.
searchable_text: Cuatro Cuba Libre main rum BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum A refreshing Cuba Libre variation made with BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, cola, and fresh lime. BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum and cola transforms this classic cuba libre cocktail into a complex, but still refreshing libation with a bright and zesty finish from the squeezed fresh lime. A perfect drink to enjoy with friends. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, 100 ml cola, 2 lime wedges recipe steps Build: Fill a highball glass with ice. Squeeze 2 lime wedges over the ice and drop them into the glass. Pour in the BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir. Garnish with lime.
